channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Iowa State's 30-year streak of hitting a 3-pointer ends in win over Texas Tech
item.description: Iowa State's NCAA record streak of 945 consecutive games with a 3-pointer ended Tuesday night in a 71-58 victory over Texas Tech. The Cyclones had made a 3-pointer in every game dating back to Feb. 19, 1995, at Colorado when the school was still part of the Big Eight.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Penguins star Evgeni Malkin has 3 Stanley Cup rings stolen in home burglary
item.description: Pittsburgh Penguins star forward Evgeni Malkin had his three Stanley Cup rings stolen in a home burglary, as Malkin becomes the latest high-profile athlete targeted.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lady Vols coach Kim Caldwell about to experience another 1st with her baby due any day
item.description: Being a private person from a small town, Kim Caldwell keeps her business to herself. That's why she ducked and dodged questions for months about her first pregnancy. Then the woman who announced with a social media post on Sept.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Novak Djokovic breaks a tie with Roger Federer for the most Grand Slam matches in tennis history
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Novak Djokovic added yet another record to his lengthy list, breaking a tie with Roger Federer for the most Grand Slam matches played in tennis history by reaching 430 on Wednesday at the Australian Open in what was a tougher-than-expected second-round victory.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: High-flying Plateau Valley Cowboys dominate Caprock in boys and girls basketball
item.description: With the Caprock Academy Eagles in town, Plateau Valley displayed their skill and athleticism in both girls and boys hoops.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Australian Open: Naomi Osaka is back in a Slam's 3rd round for the 1st time in 3 years
item.description: Naomi Osaka is back in the third round of a Grand Slam tournament for the first time since 2022 and she got there with wins at the Australian Open over two women who blocked her path last year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Man accused of stalking Caitlin Clark proclaims himself 'guilty as charged' in 1st court appearance
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — One day after Michael Thomas Lewis was charged with felony stalking of Indiana Fever star and WNBA rookie of the year Caitlin Clark, the 55-year-old Texas man shouted “guilty as charged” as soon as he sat down in a courtroom Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Golf legend John Daly announces he underwent emergency hand surgery
item.description: Golfer John Daly announced that he underwent emergency hand surgery in a post to Instagram on Monday. Daly said he would be back playing in no time.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GOP lawmakers, Riley Gaines slam Democrats for voting against Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act
item.description: The U.S. House of Representatives passed the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act, but most Democrats passionately opposed it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lions winning in ways they haven't in Super Bowl era after franchise finally found the right leaders
item.description: ALLEN PARK, Mich. (AP) — Sheila Ford Hamp stepped up to support general manager Brad Holmes and coach Dan Campbell when the Detroit Lions were 4-18-1 under their leadership. Back then, there were doubts that Detroit got it right.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mike Tomlin doesn't feel the Steelers are stuck, but all options are on the table heading into 2025
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — There is a sameness to the way the Pittsburgh Steelers keep ending their seasons. Yet Mike Tomlin shrugged on Tuesday when asked if it feels as if the Steelers are “stuck” after their fifth first-round playoff exit in eight years, all of them embarrassing in their own way.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House Republicans pass bill to ban transgender athletes from girls’ sports
item.description: House Republicans passed a bill Tuesday to bar transgender student-athletes from competing in girls’ sports, putting the contentious issue front and center following an election cycle that saw it become a frequent target of Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: Oakland Coliseum buyers closing in on Alameda County’s approval of massive sale
item.description: AASEG promises to transform the property into a new hub of restaurants, retail, housing, entertainment and live sports.
item.dc:creator: Shomik Mukherjee, The Mercury News

item.title: San Diego Wave FC trades Jaedyn Shaw to the North Carolina Courage
item.description: Midfielder Jaedyn Shaw has been traded by the San Diego Wave FC to the North Carolina Courage, the football club announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: NFL playoffs: Matchups, history and what to know for Divisional Round weekend
item.description: As the Bears' search for a new head coach intensifies — and seemingly now includes every candidate out there (see our Coaching Tracker) — there are still eight teams left in the NFL playoffs. Obviously, this is where the Bears hope their new coach will take them one day, and beyond.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: High school girls basketball rankings Jan. 14, 2025: Bay Area News Group Top 20
item.description: Archbishop Mitty remains No. 1, followed by Acalanes, Carondelet, San Ramon Valley. Oakland Tech among teams to move up.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: Mike McCarthy won't return as the Cowboys' coach. Deion Sanders could be a candidate to replace him
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike McCarthy will not return as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, owner Jerry Jones said Monday. Jones said the organization and McCarthy mutually agreed to part ways.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Sabonis stars as DeRozan and the streaking Kings beat the Bulls 124-119
item.description: Domantas Sabonis had 22 points, 15 rebounds and eight assists, and the Sacramento Kings beat the Chicago Bulls 124-119 on Sunday to extend their season-high win streak to seven games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: New England hires former Patriots Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as coach
item.description: The team announced the hiring Sunday morning, a week after Patriots owner Robert Kraft fired Jerod Mayo following the team’s season-ending victory over the Buffalo Bills. Mayo finished 4-13 in his lone season.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: MLB Players Trust hosts clinic for little leaguers
item.description: The rookies and baseball pros were all smiles during a special clinic to give back to the community and those affected by last year's hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Brew, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jackson and Henry lead the way as the Ravens run over the rival Steelers 28-14 in the AFC playoffs
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson handed off to Derrick Henry, then slid out to the left as if he still had the ball. A couple linebackers shifted into Jackson's path, leaving the middle open for Henry to run through for a 44-yard touchdown.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ezra Ausar scores 21 as Utah earns first Big 12 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ezra Ausar scored a season-high 21 points in just 17 minutes of action. as the Utah basketball team won its first Big 12 Conference game Saturday, beating Oklahoma State, 83-62.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hayton scores dramatic goal in 2-1 win over San Jose
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Barrett Hayton scored with 1:32 remaining in regulation to give the Utah Hockey Club a 2-1 win against the San Jose Sharks at Delta Center on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: Sawyer stripped Texas quarterback Quinn Ewers — his former roommate — and returned the fumble 83 yards for the clinching touchdown in a 28-14 victory over the Longhorns in the Cotton Bowl on Friday night, giving the Buckeyes a shot at their sixth AP national title.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Public Schools paid $390K to do-not-hire sports officials
item.description: Chicago Public Schools paid $390,000 to at least 36 people who were on a do-not-hire list to officiate sporting events.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Expect road closures in Santee for 2025 USATF National Race Walk Championships
item.description: The City of Santee is hosting the 2025 USATF National Race Walk Championships this weekend, and several road closures will be in place Sunday morning into the early afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs Bonus: Tampa Bay looking for similar results in Wild Card rematch against Washington
item.description: With the Buccaneers gearing up for their fifth straight Post Season run, Barber joins a special episode of Bucs Bonus to talk about what the team needs to do to contain rookie quarterback phenom Jayden Daniels and the Washington Commanders offense that has leveled up since the two teams met in week
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jazz go cold in 97-92 loss to the Heat
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The Utah Jazz just can't seem to find a way to be able to close out games at home this season. Tyler Herro scored 23 points and Jaime Jaquez had 20, including five in the final 1:03, to lead the Miami Heat to a 97-92 victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Basketball: Men get first RMAC win under Dunlap as Women cruise past NMHU
item.description: After a three-week break, Colorado Mesa Basketball is back. And they're off to a great start in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Independent streak helped build Notre Dame into football's historic and now modern behemoth
item.description: DANIA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — It was some combination of religion, a grudge involving Knute Rockne and maybe the simple notion that some people just don't like Notre Dame.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: NHL postpones LA Kings' home game against Calgary due to wildfires while NFL, NBA monitor situation
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The NHL postponed the Los Angeles Kings' home game against the Calgary Flames on Wednesday with several massive wildfires burning across the greater Los Angeles area. The Kings and Flames were scheduled to play Wednesday night at the Kings' downtown arena.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, NewsNation
